inspirations.name: Ericcson Prof. Roland
inspirations.influence: Pioneer in wireless technology and 5G standards. His groundbreaking work on mobile networks continues to inspire innovations in telecommunications.

inspirations.name: Vint Cerf
inspirations.influence: Co-designer of TCP/IP protocol. His vision for scalable, interoperable network architectures shaped modern internet infrastructure.

inspirations.name: Grace Hopper
inspirations.influence: Computing pioneer and visionary. Her contributions to programming languages and computing education continue to inspire generations of engineers.

inspirations.name: Hedy Lamarr
inspirations.influence: Inventor of spread spectrum technology. Her innovative approach to secure communications laid the foundation for modern wireless technologies.

inspirations.name: Dr. Richard Stallman
inspirations.influence: Advocate for free and open-source software. His philosophy on collaborative development has transformed the technology industry.

inspirations.name: Linus Torvalds
inspirations.influence: Creator of Linux kernel. Demonstrated how collaborative, open-source projects can create robust, globally-adopted technologies.
